problem: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer?
hypothesis: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Bioelectrochemical. Bioelectrochemical system for pollutant conversion directly addresses this.
